WebResource.Description: ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order Export Ribbon Scripts
WebResource.DependencyXml: <Dependencies><Dependency componentType="WebResource"><Library name="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1033.resx" displayName="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1033.resx" languagecode="1033" description="ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order PDF Export English Resource Strings" libraryUniqueId="{a9699b63-1e3c-05b6-1c1b-039a5cac65ca}"/><Library name="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1036.resx" displayName="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1036.resx" languagecode="1036" description="ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order PDF Export French Resource Strings" libraryUniqueId="{82b58539-1873-8347-299b-ecb285395698}"/></Dependency></Dependencies>
